name: SparkCard
description: Small dashboard card with an inline sparkline chart.

api.name: SparkCard
api.description: Small dashboard card with an inline sparkline chart.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Small caption shown above the value (e.g. "Revenue"). Omitted entirely when blank.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The headline metric, rendered large and bold below the label. Omitted entirely when blank.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.description: Numeric series rendered as an inline sparkline below the value. Needs at least two points to draw a line; anything shorter renders nothing. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom content for the sparkline region, replacing the built-in chart driven by Data.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Controls padding, typography and sparkline height. Defaults to Md.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Card surface style: Default (standard border), Bordered (thicker 2px border), or Filled (muted background).

parameters.name: ShowArea
parameters.description: Fill the area under a line sparkline. (#276)

parameters.name: ShowTooltips
parameters.description: Per-point markers + hover tooltips on the inline sparkline. (#276)

parameters.name: SparkColor
parameters.description: Override the sparkline color (CSS color / var). (#276)

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root card.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root card.

enums.name: SparkCardVariant
enums.description: Default = standard card border. Bordered = thicker 2px border. Filled = muted background.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <SparkCard Label="Revenue" Value="$24,800" Data="@_revenueData" />
    <SparkCard Label="Sessions" Value="8,412" Data="@_sessionsData" />
    <SparkCard Label="Bounce Rate" Value="34.2%" Data="@_bounceData" />
</Grid>

@code {
    private IEnumerable<double> _revenueData = new double[] { 12, 18, 14, 22, 19, 25, 21, 30, 28, 35, 31 };
}

examples.title: Custom Sparkline Slot
examples.code:
<SparkCard Label="Page Views" Value="94,210">
    <Sparkline Data="@_data" Class="h-10 w-full" Color="var(--color-primary)" />
</SparkCard>

examples.title: Without Data (Label + Value only)
examples.code:
<SparkCard Label="Uptime" Value="99.98%" />
<SparkCard Label="SLA" Value="100%" />
<SparkCard Label="Incidents" Value="0" />

examples.title: Variant (interactive)
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_variant">
    <SegmentedItem Value="@SparkCard.SparkCardVariant.Default">Default</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@SparkCard.SparkCardVariant.Bordered">Bordered</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="@SparkCard.SparkCardVariant.Filled">Filled</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>
<Grid Columns="3" Gap="4">
    <SparkCard Label="Revenue" Value="$24,800" Data="@_data" Variant="@_variant" />
    <SparkCard Label="Sessions" Value="8,412" Data="@_data" Variant="@_variant" />
    <SparkCard Label="Bounce Rate" Value="34.2%" Data="@_data" Variant="@_variant" />
</Grid>

@code { private SparkCard.SparkCardVariant _variant = SparkCard.SparkCardVariant.Default; }

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Custom content for the sparkline region, replacing the built-in chart driven by Data.

mdSummary:
# SparkCard

Small dashboard card with an inline sparkline chart.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Dashboard
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/spark-card

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| SparkCard | Label | `string?` | `` | Small caption shown above the value (e.g. "Revenue"). Omitted entirely when blank. |
| SparkCard | Value | `string?` | `` | The headline metric, rendered large and bold below the label. Omitted entirely when blank. |
| SparkCard | Data | `IEnumerable\<double\>?` | `` | Numeric series rendered as an inline sparkline below the value. Needs at least two points to draw a line; anything shorter renders nothing. Ignored when ChildContent is supplied. |
| SparkCard | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom content for the sparkline region, replacing the built-in chart driven by Data. |
| SparkCard | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Controls padding, typography and sparkline height. Defaults to Md. |
| SparkCard | Variant | `SparkCardVariant` | `SparkCardVariant.Default` | Card surface style: Default (standard border), Bordered (thicker 2px border), or Filled (muted background). |
| SparkCard | Type | `Sparkline.SparkType` | `Sparkline.SparkType.Line` | Inline sparkline shape (Line / Area / Bars). (#276) |
| SparkCard | ShowArea | `bool` | `false` | Fill the area under a line sparkline. (#276) |
| SparkCard | ShowLast | `bool` | `false` | Mark the most recent point. (#276) |
| SparkCard | ShowTooltips | `bool` | `false` | Per-point markers + hover tooltips on the inline sparkline. (#276) |
| SparkCard | SparkColor | `string?` | `` | Override the sparkline color (CSS color / var). (#276) |
| SparkCard | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root card. |
| SparkCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the root card. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (SparkCard) — Custom content for the sparkline region, replacing the built-in chart driven by Data.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<SparkCard />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-card-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/SparkCard/SparkCard.razor`
